privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated TiddlyWiki entries without external datasets. The target template title 'Retrospective Template', dashboard title 'Retrospective Dashboard', and expected tags ['Meeting', 'Retrospective'] were verified against the task instructions and hardcoded evaluation variables in export_result.sh and setup_task.sh.
